source.title: China's express delivery industry reaches record-high business volume in 2025 (Global Times / State Post Bureau)

extractions.claim: China's express delivery industry handled 216.51 billion parcels in 2025, up 11.8% YoY, with business revenue of CNY 1.8 trillion, up 6.1%.
extractions.evidence: In 2025, the sector handled 216.51 billion parcels, representing a year-on-year increase of 11.8%. The industry's cumulative business revenue reached 1.8 trillion yuan, up 6.1%.

verification.verifier_notes: State Post Bureau data reported by Global Times. Growth moderated from 2024's 21% volume growth.

extractions.claim: China express carrier market share rankings (2024 volume): ZTO ~34B (19.4%), YTO ~26.6B, Yunda ~23.8B, STO ~22.7B, J&T ~19.8B, SF ~13.3B.
extractions.evidence: ZTO led at ~34 billion parcels (market share dropped from 22.9% in 2023 to 19.4% in 2024). YTO Express ~26.6 billion, Yunda ~23.8 billion, STO Express ~22.7 billion, J&T Express ~19.8 billion, SF Express ~13.3 billion.

verification.verifier_notes: Rankings from BambooWorks and carrier disclosures. J&T confirmed 30B parcels for full-year 2025 with 22.2% YoY growth (PR Newswire).

extractions.claim: Revenue per parcel continues declining across the industry, with ZTO's ASP down 1.7% for FY2025 overall despite a 2.9% increase in Q4 from product mix changes.
extractions.evidence: Average selling price for the core express delivery business increased 2.9% in Q4, driven by product mix improvements. For full-year 2025, ASP declined slightly by 1.7%.

verification.verifier_notes: ZTO ASP data from earnings release. YTO August 2025 ASP was RMB 2.15, down 1.13% YoY.

extractions.claim: J&T Express hit record 30 billion parcel volume in 2025 with 22.2% YoY growth, gaining significant market share.
extractions.evidence: J&T Express Hits Record 30 Billion Parcel Volume in 2025 with 22.2% YoY Growth.

verification.verifier_notes: J&T Express press release via PR Newswire, January 2026
